description_long: This is a sleek, modern helmet with a matte black finish, designed to cover the entire head and provide robust protection. The front features a reinforced faceplate with angular contours and a set of Japanese characters, giving it a futuristic, tactical appearance. The sides are smoothly contoured, with integrated ear protection and mesh-like vent structures near the jawline. The rear of the helmet is rounded and seamless, offering full cranial coverage without any visible openings or attachments. The chin area is reinforced with additional plating and structural elements, suggesting enhanced impact resistance. The helmet appears to be constructed primarily from high-strength polymer or composite materials, with some metallic and mesh components for added durability and ventilation.
description: A matte black, full-coverage helmet with a reinforced faceplate, Japanese text, and mesh side vents, designed for robust head protection and a futuristic look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced faceplate, Japanese text, and angular jaw protection.
description_view_1: Left-rear angle highlights the smooth, rounded shell and mesh vent near the jaw.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the seamless, rounded back of the helmet with no visible openings.
description_view_3: Right-rear angle reveals the contoured shell and mesh vent, mirroring the left side.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two mesh-like vents located on each side near the jawline, rectangular in shape and medium in size.
attribute_graphic_design: Japanese text on the front faceplate; otherwise, solid matte black with no additional graphics.
